content: <@774033563732541451>  Regarding my comment here: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/773#discussion_r3080222156 , can I assume that providing witness keys as they exist(ed) for `debug_executionWitness` json-rpc method will not be required for optional-proofs?
